subcommands.name: init
subcommands.description: initialize an empty project with the recommended settings and dependencies

subcommands.name: execute
subcommands.description: execute the formula and print the output to the terminal

options.description: to run a sync for a dynamic sync table, use this parameter to specify which URL to sync from

states.name: params
states.description: Arguments to pass to the formula

subcommands.name: auth
subcommands.description: set up authentication in your development environment so that you can execute Pack formulas with authentication applied to them

subcommands.name: register
subcommands.description: create a new API token or register an existing one to be used with future commands

subcommands.name: create
subcommands.description: create a new Pack on Coda’s servers and get assigned a Pack ID. Run this command just once for each Pack you create

options.description: specify a name for the Pack. You can always set or update the name in the Pack management UI later
specify a description for the Pack. You can always set or update the description in the Pack management UI later

subcommands.name: upload
subcommands.description: use this command to upload a new version of your Pack based on your latest code

subcommands.name: release
subcommands.description: release a Pack version and make it live for your users

states.name: version
states.description: The release version. Must always be greater than that of any of your previous releases

subcommands.name: clone
subcommands.description: migrate the development of a Pack from the Pack Studio to a new local CLI Pack development

subcommands.name: link
subcommands.description: link the development of a Pack from the Pack studio to an existing local CLI Pack development

subcommands.name: whoami
subcommands.description: looks up information about the API token that is registered in this environment

states.name: apiToken
states.description: The API token to look up

subcommands.name: build
subcommands.description: generate a bundle for your Pack

subcommands.name: setOption
subcommands.description: set a persistent build option for the Pack. This will be used for all builds of the Pack

states.name: option
states.description: Currently the only supported option is 'timerStrategy'

states.name: value
states.description: Value to set for the option
